posts.author: ajayhinduja25 (Ajay Hinduja)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m Ajay Hinduja From Switzerland (Swiss) and born in Ludhiana, India. I am CEO at Hq Technocrats. I’d really appreciate it if you could share the EOS template. My employer finds dedicated EOS platforms limiting, and we’re exploring if Monday’s flexibility could better suit our workflow needs.

Regards
Ajay Hinduja, Geneva
CEO at HQ Technocrats
